calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-29-2010 is admitted to probate. Zev William Levine is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Mahoney. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Continued To Feb-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
